_provenance.note: Phase-C mechanistic-interpretability call stacks: how each runner drives the jutari substrate (applied_on), its own core mechanism (computation), and the exact intervention oracle it is scored against (oracle). Every path is repo-relative; every line was verified by opening the file.

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET) before any replay
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame (drives boot_replay/continue re-runs)
Assemble the shared seeded-random-action gameplay-state testbed (checkpoint at f*, causes, shared screen output, cause-density gate)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... run_intervention = O.run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...) via build_acdc_shared_state

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + cropped screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Pick the corrupted resample value per source (donor byte where it diverges, else base+17)
ACDC edge-effect matrix E[i,j] = |child_j(resample-ablate source_i) - child_j(clean)|: one real-ROM re-run per source via intervene_continue (write source cell, continue tail)
computation.call: acdc_edge_effects(checkpoint, tail, cands, at_target, corrupt_at_target)  ->  intervene_continue -> intervene_ram!
computation.note: intervene_continue @ acdc.jl:290 -> intervene_ram! @ acdc.jl:274; base = continue_from(checkpoint, tail) @ acdc.jl:281

computation.desc: Discovered circuit at threshold tau: edge i->j iff E[i,j] > tau (diagonal forced off)
Threshold sweep over tau (the ACDC pruning schedule) feeding the ROC/AUC against the true data-flow graph

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed (checkpoint at f*, causes, shared screen output cell, cause-density gate)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = intervene_ram!, run_intervention = run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Single-site activation patch: write the patched value into one RAM cell / TIA register, re-run the tail, snapshot (the TRUE patch)
computation.call: run_patch(checkpoint, tail, kind, site, value)  ->  intervene_ram!/intervene_tia!

computation.desc: Patch loop: recovered (rec_snap) vs exact-clean and corrupted-fresh (ex_snap) re-runs per patch site, both via run_patch

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed via build_attr_shared_state (also builds the sampler-aware position read through soft_ram_peek)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... run_intervention = run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...) via build_attr_shared_state

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: THE gradient step (linear/gradient surrogate): local slope (partial y / partial a)|_clean via a central finite difference of the true patch at a+eps and a-eps
computation.note: gradient surrogate over the true patch run_patch (activation_patching.jl:282)

computation.desc: Attribution approx = grad*(a'-a) compared cell-by-cell against the exact full re-run patch (ex_snap = run_patch) in _run_game_body
computation.call: ex_snap = run_patch(clean_ckpt, tail, p.kind, p.site, p.value)

computation.desc: Sampler-aware position gradient (redesign Problem 2): differentiable screen-position read of the RAM tape through the bilinear sampler; nonzero partial/partial ram[pidx] via the one-hot soft RAM read

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

attribution_patching.jaxtari_note: jaxtari/jaxtari/diff/soft_step.py (soft_ram_peek @ line 102) — the JAX SOFT-STE gradient path, forward-bit-exact to the HARD jutari map. attribution_patching is the ONLY Phase-C method with a gradient step; its sampler-aware position gradient routes through soft_ram_peek (jutari/src/diff/SoftStep.jl:108), whose JAX sibling is this file.

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed (checkpoint at f*, causes, shared screen output, cause-density gate)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = intervene_ram!, run_intervention = run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Build the per-cell resample-value pool from the at-target state (donor activations to swap in for out-of-circuit cells)
Scrubbing re-run: resample-ablate every out-of-circuit candidate cell (in-circuit cells keep their base value), then continue the tail and snapshot
computation.call: scrub_assign(base_ckpt, tail, cand_idx, circuit, assign)  ->  intervene_ram!
computation.note: intervene_ram! @ causal_scrubbing.jl:294; performance-preserved compared TRUE vs WRONG circuit hypotheses

computation.desc: True data-flow graph the scrub hypothesis is checked against (per-cell interchange over the candidate set) + ancestors closure
computation.call: true_dataflow_graph(base_ckpt, tail, cand_idx, at_target)  ->  intervene_ram!; ancestors(A, out)

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed (checkpoint at f*, causes, shared screen output, cause-density gate)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = intervene_ram!, run_intervention = run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Define the abstract variables (concept-labelled RAM cells) the DAS alignment maps onto

Interchange intervention: write the source-run cell value(s) into a deepcopy of the base checkpoint, continue the tail, snapshot (the DAS interchange / resample re-run measuring alignment-cell effect on each variable readout)
computation.call: interchange(base_ckpt, tail, kind, sites, values)  ->  intervene_ram!/intervene_tia!; env_step!

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame (also drives the RAM-trajectory recording)
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed via build_dict_shared_state
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = J.intervene_ram!, run_intervention = O.run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Record the RAM trajectory (per-frame 128-byte tape) the dictionary is fit on
Fit the dictionary on the RAM tape: PCA / NMF / SAE
computation.call: run_pca(tape, rank) / run_nmf(tape, rank) / run_sae(tape, hidden)

computation.desc: CAUSAL-USE test: ablate atom k (zero its activation), DECODE to a full 128-byte RAM vector, WRITE it into the env over all cells and re-run; effect = screen change vs the reconstruction control
computation.call: causal_use(m, checkpoint, at_target, tail, ...)  ->  rerun_with_ram(checkpoint, bk, tail)
computation.note: rerun_with_ram writes the decoded RAM over all cells via intervene_ram! (dictionaries.jl:671 -> :674)

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame (drives the RAM-tape recording)
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed via build_linear_probing_shared_state
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = J.intervene_ram!, run_intervention = O.run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Record the per-frame RAM tape (128-byte activations) the probes are trained on
Train a linear (ridge) probe per RAM cell + control-task selectivity: probe accuracy on the real label vs a random control label
computation.call: probe_accuracy(Xtr, ytr, Xte, yte, nclass; lambda = RIDGE_LAMBDA)

computation.desc: Cross-reference each probed cell with the oracle causal flag (transient/causal cells) so selectivity is scored against real causal use

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame (drives the RAM-tape / trajectory-set recording)
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed (checkpoint at f*, causes, shared screen output, cause-density gate)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = intervene_ram!, run_intervention = run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Build the per-site trajectory set (poke each candidate cell across offsets, record the RAM tape) the readouts are fit on
Per-site readout fidelity: ridge-fit a linear readout from each site to the output and score R^2
Faithful-weight fraction vs the oracle causal mask: build the causal mask by poking each site (+SET_DELTA), re-run, and compare which readout weights land on truly-causal cells

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame (the one-hop and tail replays)
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed (checkpoint at f*, causes, shared screen output, cause-density gate)
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = intervene_ram!, run_intervention = run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Path patch edge i->j: corrupt the sender cell, step ONE frame (i -> t+1), freeze-restore every other candidate cell at t+1 to its clean value (leaving only j on the i->j edge), continue the rest of the tail, snapshot
computation.call: path_patch(checkpoint, clean_next, nodes, sender_i, receiver_j, sender_value, rest_tail; hop_action)  ->  intervene_ram!; env_step!

computation.desc: Node-level true data-flow graph (transitive reachability) the recovered circuit is scored against
Recovered path circuit: which edges fire under the single-shot path patch (vs the exhaustive-do-set true routine graph @ :353)

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon

applied_on.desc: Boot the real ROM with the xitari-parity reset (60 NOOP + 4 RESET)
Deterministically step the emulator one action per env-frame (drives the RAM-trajectory recording)
Assemble the shared gameplay-state testbed via build_sae_shared_state
applied_on.call: build_shared_testbed(game; ... intervene_ram = J.intervene_ram!, run_intervention = O.run_intervention, soft_ram_peek = soft_ram_peek, ...)

applied_on.desc: Freeze byte-exact RAM + screen out of the env at a frame

computation.desc: Record the RAM trajectory (per-frame 128-byte tape) the SAE is fit on
Fit the sparse autoencoder (L1-regularised) on the z-scored RAM tape
computation.call: fit!(s::SAE, X; epochs, lr)  (ctor SAE @ :375, loss @ :395)

computation.desc: CAUSAL-USE test: ablate feature f (zero its code), DECODE + denorm to a full raw RAM vector, WRITE it over all cells and re-run; effect = screen break of ablated-decode vs un-ablated-decode re-run (isolates the feature)
computation.call: causal_use(...) -> run_full_write(raw_ablate) -> intervene_ram! over all cells; env_step!
computation.note: run_full_write writes the decoded RAM via intervene_ram! (sae.jl:627), denorm_ram @ :598; scored only on ORACLE-CAUSAL cells via oracle_importance @ :536

oracle.desc: Exact intervention oracle Delta_y(u) = y(do(u:=v')) - y(baseline): apply the cause to a deepcopy of the checkpoint and continue the horizon
